ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. Original certificate with ICC stamp and QR code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. Two pages with goods summary on page 2.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-23D-807485 does not constitute an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: Header/branding 'Swedish Match' (logo at top of page)
Invoice page 1: Footer 'Swedish Match Industries AB'
Invoice page 1: Postal address block 'Swedish Match Industries AB' in header area
Invoice page 2: Header/branding 'Swedish Match' (logo at top of page)
Invoice page 2: Footer 'Swedish Match Industries AB'
Invoice page 2: Text body 'Swedish Match Industries AB / Logistics & Customer Service'

pairing_validation.motivation: Criteria 2 met: Certificate consignor 'Swedish Match Industries AB' is identifiable in the invoice as the issuer (header, footer, branding). Criteria 3 met: Certificate consignee 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY' is identifiable in the invoice as the Buyer/Invoice address and Customer. No invoice number is stated in the certificate, so criteria 1 is not applicable. Pairing validation passes.

consignor.certificate_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, Box 84, SE-522 22, TIDAHOLM, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, P.O Box 84, SE-522 22 Tidaholm, Sweden (issuer/header/footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'Swedish Match Industries AB' found explicitly in invoice: (1) Header/logo branding 'Swedish Match' on page 1 and 2, (2) Footer on both pages: 'Swedish Match Industries AB', (3) Postal address block. The full legal name 'Swedish Match Industries AB' is the invoice issuer. Direct match — no need to proceed to sequential 4.1.3 tests.
Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice footer postal address states 'Sweden'. Additionally, VAT number 'SE556005025301' has SE prefix confirming Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verification via VAT number SE prefix

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Swedish Match Industries AB' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'Swedish Match Industries AB' as confirmed by the header branding, footer text, and postal address on both pages. The company name is an exact match. Country 'Sweden' is confirmed via explicit address and SE-prefix VAT number SE556005025301. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA
consignee.invoice_value: PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA (Buyer / Invoice address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains a 'Buyer / Invoice address' field with 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA'. This is the primary billing/facturation field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer/invoice address
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignee: 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY'. Invoice Buyer/Invoice address: 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate states 'USA'. Invoice Buyer/Invoice address states 'USA'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a separate 'Consignee' field with 'Puerto Rico Supplies Group, Inc'
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice contains a separate 'Consignee' field listing 'Puerto Rico Supplies Group, Inc' at a different address (Bayamon). However, per rule 4.2.0.2, the primary billing field ('Buyer / Invoice address') takes priority for consignee verification. Certificate's consignee 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY' is found in the primary billing field. The separate 'Consignee' field in the invoice is a shipping/delivery consignee and does not override the billing match. Additionally, the 'Customer' field also confirms 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY'.

rules_applied.description: Priority: Buyer/Invoice address is the primary billing field

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY' in USA. The invoice has a 'Buyer / Invoice address' field (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) showing 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA'. The name and full address match exactly. Country USA matches. The invoice also has a separate 'Consignee' field with 'Puerto Rico Supplies Group, Inc' but this is a secondary delivery/shipping field and does not override the primary billing match. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate consignee should be matched against invoice 'Consignee' field (Puerto Rico Supplies Group, Inc)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.2.0.2, the primary billing field (Buyer/Invoice address) has priority. Certificate consignee matches the Buyer/Invoice address exactly. The invoice 'Consignee' field is a shipping consignee, not the factoring address.

goods_description.certificate_value:
SAFETY MATCHES
MADE IN SWEDEN
2560 cartons of Safety Matches
goods_description.invoice_value: Safety Matches (Goods summery, page 2); Three Stars P.R. SE / Three Stars SE (line items); Marks: Strike on Box / Safety Matches / Made in Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain article/item numbers. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate's identity-bearing main designation is 'SAFETY MATCHES'. Invoice page 2 'Goods summery' states 'Safety Matches' as goods description. After case normalization: 'safety matches' = 'safety matches'. Exact match. Additionally, invoice page 1 marks section states 'Safety Matches / Made in Sweden' which further confirms.

comparison_steps.description: Check if additional text affects product identity
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate adds 'MADE IN SWEDEN' and '2560 cartons of' — these are origin marking and packaging/quantity info, not identity-bearing. Invoice line items use brand names 'Three Stars P.R.' and 'Three Stars' which are specific product variants of safety matches. The goods summary explicitly states 'Safety Matches' matching the certificate. No MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'SAFETY MATCHES' found in invoice goods summary
Non-identity-bearing additions - 'MADE IN SWEDEN' and packaging info do not change product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'SAFETY MATCHES / MADE IN SWEDEN / 2560 cartons of Safety Matches'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'SAFETY MATCHES'. Invoice page 2 goods summary explicitly states 'Safety Matches' as the goods description with stat no 36050000. This is an exact text match after case normalization. The invoice marks section on page 1 also states 'Safety Matches / Made in Sweden'. Line item descriptions ('Three Stars P.R.' and 'Three Stars') are brand/product variant names for matches, and the summary 'Safety Matches' confirms the product type. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate says 'SAFETY MATCHES' but invoice lines say 'Three Stars' — possible MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.reason: 'Three Stars' is a brand name for a specific type of safety match. The invoice goods summary on page 2 explicitly summarizes all items as 'Safety Matches'. The identity-bearing designation is verified via the summary, not brand names on individual lines.

evidence.raw_text:
SAFETY MATCHES
MADE IN SWEDEN
2560 cartons of Safety Matches
Marks: Marks: Strike on Box / Safety Matches / Made in Sweden.

quantity.invoice_value: Av.gr.weight KG: 15456; quantity: 2560 CRT (Goods summery, page 2)

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains the value 15456. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate Box 7 states '15456'. No unit is explicitly stated in Box 7 alone. However, Box 6 states '2560 cartons of Safety Matches' which is a separate quantity.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct occurrence check for Box 7 value (15456)
comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 15456 in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 2 'Goods summery' shows 'Av.gr.weight KG: 15456'. The numeric value 15456 is explicitly present in the invoice. Value identified.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 states 15456 without explicit unit or weight category. Apply rule 4.4.2.2.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate states a single numeric value 15456 without explicit unit or GW/NW category. Invoice confirms this value as 'Av.gr.weight KG: 15456'. Invoice also states 'Av.net.weight KG: 15008' (a different value). Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 3: certificate states ONE weight value without category, value can be identified in invoice, but invoice ALSO states another weight value under another category. However, the certificate value 15456 matches EXACTLY with the invoice GW value 15456. Since 15456 ≠ 15008, the certificate is clearly referring to the GW value. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified — the GW value is verified. The NW value 15008 is not stated in the certificate and thus is not contradicted.

Certificate Box 6 states '2560 cartons of Safety Matches'. Invoice page 2 'Goods summery' shows 'quantity: 2560, Unit: CRT'. CRT = cartons. Numeric value 2560 matches exactly. This provides additional confirmation.

comparison_steps.description: Check if summation of invoice line items confirms quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice line 1: 1600 CRT + Invoice line 2: 960 CRT = 2560 CRT. This matches certificate's 2560 cartons and invoice goods summary's 2560 CRT. Consistent.

rules_applied.description: Direct occurrence check - 15456 found in invoice goods summary as Av.gr.weight KG
Box 7 value (15456) is the verification-grounding quantity
Single weight value without explicit category - identified in invoice as GW
Multiple quantities - at least one verified (GW 15456 and cartons 2560 both match)

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 value is 15456 (no explicit unit). Invoice page 2 goods summary shows 'Av.gr.weight KG: 15456' — exact numeric match. Certificate Box 6 also states '2560 cartons'. Invoice goods summary shows 'quantity: 2560, Unit: CRT, Goods description: Safety Matches'. Both quantity values from the certificate (15456 and 2560) are explicitly found in the invoice. Line items 1600+960=2560 CRT. No contradictions. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Box 7 value 15456 has no unit stated — should be MISMATCH per 4.4.2
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.4.2 requires unit when a numeric quantity is stated. However, 15456 in Box 7 is a standalone numeric value. The invoice confirms it as a weight in KG. Per 4.4.2.2 the weight value without explicit category is still verifiable when it can be identified in the invoice. Additionally, the secondary quantity (2560 cartons) from Box 6 is independently verifiable. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity verified is sufficient.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Marks: Made in Sweden; Ctr column: SE (both line items)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin indication in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 1 marks section: 'Made in Sweden'. Invoice line items: 'Ctr' column shows 'SE' for both lines (country code for Sweden). 'Made in Sweden' is an explicit origin statement per 4.5.1.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EC; Sweden'. EC = European Community.
comparison_steps.detail: Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'EC' / 'European Community' is treated as equivalent to 'European Union'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, if the certificate states 'EU' and the invoice states a specific EU member state (Sweden), this is verified. Additionally, Sweden is explicitly named in the certificate alongside EC.

comparison_steps.description: Verify Sweden as EU member state
comparison_steps.detail: Sweden (SE) is an EU-27 member state. Certificate states 'EC; Sweden'. Invoice explicitly states 'Made in Sweden' and 'SE' in country column. Both the EC/EU component and the specific country Sweden are verified.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.2.1 - EU combined with one specific country
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states EU combined with one specific EU member (Sweden). Invoice confirms 'Made in Sweden' and no non-EU origins present.
comparison_steps.detail: Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [country]' (here EC; Sweden) and invoice contains an explicit EU-origin statement (Made in Sweden, SE in Ctr column), this is MATCH. Invoice contains no origins from outside EU. All conditions met.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via 'Made in Sweden' in invoice marks
EU member state check - Sweden is EU member, invoice confirms Sweden
EU combined with one specific EU member country

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'EC; Sweden'. 'EC' = European Community = EU. Sweden is an EU member state. Invoice marks section explicitly states 'Made in Sweden'. Invoice Ctr column shows 'SE' for both line items. Per rule 4.5.4.1, EC/European Community is equivalent to EU. Per rule 4.5.4.2, certificate stating EU + specific EU member is verified when invoice confirms that member state. Invoice shows 'Made in Sweden' — exact match for the named country. No non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate
Document A is the certificate (1 page). Document B is the invoice (2 pages). Clear separation.
Consignor 'Swedish Match Industries AB' identifiable in invoice. Consignee 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY' identifiable in invoice. At least one criterion met.
Swedish Match Industries AB found as invoice issuer
Buyer/Invoice address field identified as primary billing field
PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY exact match
SAFETY MATCHES found in invoice goods summary
15456 found in invoice as Av.gr.weight KG
Sweden is EU member, invoice confirms Made in Sweden

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU combined with one specific EU member country
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate 'EC; Sweden', invoice 'Made in Sweden' — conditions met

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Swedish Match Industries AB i Sverige är fakturans utställare. Mottagaren Puerto Rico Supplies Company i USA återfinns som köpare i fakturan. Varubeskrivningen 'Safety Matches' och kvantiteten 2560 kartonger / 15456 kg bekräftas av fakturans varuöversikt. Ursprungslandet EC/Sverige bekräftas av fakturans 'Made in Sweden'-markering. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.

consistency_check.detail: All 5 applicable checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods_description, quantity, country_of_origin) have status MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.overall_result: IDENTICAL — Alla kontrollpunkter verifierade som MATCH

sections.certificate_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, Box 84, SE-522 22, TIDAHOLM, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, P.O Box 84, SE-522 22 Tidaholm, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning — consignor är fakturans utställare
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Swedish Match Industries AB' i Sverige är identisk med fakturans utställare som framgår av sidhuvud, sidfot och postadress. Land Sverige bekräftas av adress och VAT-nummer med SE-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA
sections.invoice_value: PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY, P.O.BOX 11908, CAPARRA HTS STATION, SAN JUAN, PR 00922, USA (Buyer / Invoice address)
sections.rule_applied: Buyer/Invoice address-fält (primärt faktureringsfält) innehåller exakt samma mottagare
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'PUERTO RICO SUPPLIES COMPANY' i USA matchar exakt fakturans 'Buyer / Invoice address'-fält. Namn, adress och land är identiska. Fakturans separata 'Consignee'-fält visar 'Puerto Rico Supplies Group, Inc' men detta är en leveransmottagare — det primära faktureringsfältet har prioritet.

sections.certificate_value: SAFETY MATCHES / MADE IN SWEDEN / 2560 cartons of Safety Matches
sections.invoice_value: Safety Matches (Goods summery, s.2); Three Stars P.R. / Three Stars (radposter); Marks: Safety Matches / Made in Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'SAFETY MATCHES' identifierad i fakturans varuöversikt
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'SAFETY MATCHES' återfinns exakt i fakturans varuöversikt ('Goods summery') på sida 2 som 'Safety Matches'. Fakturans märkestext bekräftar också 'Safety Matches / Made in Sweden'. Radposterna anger varumärkesnamn ('Three Stars') som är varianter av tändstickor.

sections.invoice_value: Av.gr.weight KG: 15456; quantity: 2560 CRT (Goods summery, s.2)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll — båda kvantitetsvärdena identifierade i fakturans varuöversikt
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ruta 7-värde 15456 återfinns exakt i fakturans varuöversikt som 'Av.gr.weight KG: 15456'. Certifikatets '2560 cartons' från ruta 6 återfinns som 'quantity: 2560, Unit: CRT' i samma varuöversikt. Radposterna bekräftar: 1600 + 960 = 2560 CRT.

sections.invoice_value: Made in Sweden (märkestext); SE (landskolumn, båda rader)
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (EC = EU) samt direkt landmatchning för Sverige
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'EC; Sweden'. EC = European Community = EU. Fakturans märkestext anger 'Made in Sweden' och landskolumnen visar 'SE' för båda radposterna. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Både EU-komponenten och det specifika landet Sverige är verifierade. Inga icke-EU-ursprung förekommer i fakturan.

output_quality_checks.detail: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.85. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is valid for IDENTICAL result.
